honest_audit.borderline_notes: PRIME-CYCLE-REPLAY (prime-numbered, coprime-with-other-cycle replay-buffer scheduling) did not surface in retrieved 2024-2026 LLM literature. Adaptive replay (MSSR) and surprise-driven replay (SURE) are nearest but use selection heuristics rather than number-theoretic coprime period choice. Flagged for human review; possible follow-up search across number theory / scheduling theory literature outside ML venues.
